title: Bartlettina hemisphaerica
taxonomy: Bartlettina hemisphaerica is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico. The plant's classification also includes its genus, which is part of the tribe Bartlettieae. Bartlettina hemisphaerica is closely related to other plants within the same tribe and family. Further classification may include its order, class, and kingdom.
